commands.review_summary:
The PR threads replayable `reply_payload_sending` hook metadata into `deliverAgentCommandResult` durable sends and adds focused regression coverage.

PR surface: Source +13, Tests +51. Total +64 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level: current main omits `replyPayloadSendingHook` in `deliverAgentCommandResult` while the normal routed reply path passes it, so a focused test asserting hook metadata on durable final delivery would fail before the patch. I did not run tests because this review is read-only.
commands.review_followup: - No automated repair is needed; maintainer review should accept the message-delivery hook behavior, proof depth, and canonical PR choice before merge.

target.title: fix: route agent command replies through reply hooks
target.body:
## Summary

- Fixes agent-command durable final delivery so recovered/main-session replies carry `reply_payload_sending` hook metadata into the existing outbound send path.
- Lets channel plugins that rely on `reply_payload_sending` observe, rewrite, cancel, or fallback-deliver recovered agent replies instead of missing them.
- Keeps recovery events, plugin API shape, session schema, and delivery queue schema unchanged.

## Linked context

Closes #90282.

Related #90282.

## Real behavior proof

Behavior or issue addressed: restart-recovered agent-command final replies now pass replayable `reply_payload_sending` hook metadata into durable outbound delivery before the outbound adapter receives the payload.

Real environment tested: Windows local OpenClaw checkout. Direct runtime proof was captured at PR head `445bb4a60` with Node v26.1.0, isolated temporary `OPENCLAW_STATE_DIR` and `OPENCLAW_HOME`. The branch was later rebased onto current `origin/main` and reverified at PR head `7c28e8b60f`; the remaining source delta is the same delivery hook wiring plus conflict resolution in the touched test file.

Exact steps or command run after this patch: original runtime proof ran `node_modules\.bin\tsx.cmd %TEMP%\openclaw-pr90300-proof-...\proof.mts`, which registered a `reply_payload_sending` hook, delivered one agent-command reply to `slack/#proof`, and printed the payload received by the outbound adapter. Fresh verification at rebased head `7c28e8b60f` ran:

```text
node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/command/delivery.test.ts
node_modules\.bin\oxfmt.cmd --check src\agents\command\delivery.ts src\agents\command\delivery.test.ts
git diff --check origin/main..HEAD
node scripts/run-oxlint.mjs src/agents/command/delivery.ts src/agents/command/delivery.test.ts
node scripts/run-tsgo.mjs -p test/tsconfig/tsconfig.core.test.json --incremental --tsBuildInfoFile .artifacts/tsgo-cache/core-test.tsbuildinfo
python .agents\skills\autoreview\scripts\autoreview --mode branch --base origin/main
```

Evidence after fix:

```text
proof: deliveryStatus=sent deliverySucceeded=true
proof: hookCalls=1
proof: hookKind=final hookChannel=slack hookSession=agent:tester:slack:direct:alice hookRun=run-proof-1
proof: hookContext={"channelId":"slack","accountId":"workspace-1","conversationId":"#proof","sessionKey":"agent:tester:slack:direct:alice","runId":"run-proof-1"}
proof: deliveredText=hooked: final answer
proof: deliveredTo=#proof deliveredChannel=slack
proof: isolatedStateDir=true

rebased head 7c28e8b60f:
src/agents/command/delivery.test.ts: 21 passed
oxfmt: All matched files use the correct format
git diff --check: clean
run-oxlint: exit 0
run-tsgo core test lane: exit 0
autoreview: clean, no accepted/actionable findings
```

Observed result after fix: delivery completed with `deliveryStatus=sent`; the hook ran once for the `final` payload with channel/session/run context; the outbound adapter received `hooked: final answer`, proving the delivered reply was the hook-mutated payload. The rebased head keeps the same delivery behavior and the focused regression still observes the durable delivery hook metadata.

What was not tested: a live gateway restart with external Slack/Discord credentials was not run in this local environment.

Proof limitations or environment constraints: this is local runtime proof for the OpenClaw delivery/hook/outbound path plus fresh source-level verification at the rebased PR head. It does not prove third-party transport delivery after a full gateway process restart.

Before evidence: the added regression first failed before implementation because durable delivery args had `replyPayloadSendingHook` as `undefined`.

## Tests and validation

- `node_modules\.bin\tsx.cmd %TEMP%\openclaw-pr90300-proof-...\proof.mts`
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/command/delivery.test.ts`
- `node_modules\.bin\oxfmt.cmd --check src\agents\command\delivery.ts src\agents\command\delivery.test.ts`
- `git diff --check origin/main..HEAD`
- `node scripts/run-oxlint.mjs src/agents/command/delivery.ts src/agents/command/delivery.test.ts`
- `node scripts/run-tsgo.mjs -p test/tsconfig/tsconfig.core.test.json --incremental --tsBuildInfoFile .artifacts/tsgo-cache/core-test.tsbuildinfo`
- `python .agents\skills\autoreview\scripts\autoreview --mode branch --base origin/main`

Regression coverage added:

- Added `deliverAgentCommandResult` coverage asserting durable final delivery receives replayable `reply_payload_sending` hook metadata.
- Made two existing workspace-dir assertions platform-neutral with `path.resolve(...)` so the focused file passes on Windows too.

## Risk checklist

- User-visible behavior changed: yes. Recovered/main-session agent-command final replies can now run the existing `reply_payload_sending` hook path before delivery.
- Config, environment, or migration behavior changed: no.
- Security, auth, secrets, network, or tool execution behavior changed: no.
- Highest-risk area: plugin hooks now run for this agent-command durable final delivery path, matching the existing reply delivery contract.
- Mitigation: the change uses the already-supported durable outbound hook field and keeps queue/replay behavior in the existing outbound delivery layer; focused regression coverage checks the metadata passed to durable delivery.

## Current review state

- Branch rebased onto `6868cde4d4` and pushed as `7c28e8b60f`.
- Local focused test, format, lint, whitespace, core test type lane, and autoreview are clean on the rebased head.
- Runtime proof above has been added for the proof gate; the rebased head is waiting on GitHub CI.
- Remaining maintainer judgment: whether a full live gateway restart with external channel credentials is required beyond this local runtime delivery proof.
- Next action: CI/proof-gate completion and maintainer review.
